defends: Dependency-CVE alerting is configured (Dependabot config or an SCA workflow step) so vulnerable/outdated components are detected before a known CVE becomes an exploitable path (OWASP A06).
self_guard: bad fixture has a .github tree but no qualifying dependency-alerting source (negative control fires as fail); good fixture has a valid dependabot.yml and passes clean.
note: Fixed evidence manifest — what the dependency-audit check audits is not model discretion (WORKING_METHOD §1). Absence of ANY dependency-CVE alerting in a readable repo is itself the finding (fail, not unknown); unknown is reserved for an unreadable target. This verifies that alerting is WIRED, not that every advisory is acted on — remediation discipline is practice, not a mechanical check.
